title: While Condition
description: Repeat a block of code as long as a boolean condition remains true using the while loop.
problemStatement:
Countdown! Create a variable `count` starting at `3`. Use a `while` loop that prints the current count and decrements it, stopping when `count` is no longer greater than `0`.

**Requirement:** Ensure your condition eventually becomes false to avoid infinite loops.
hints: Always update your control variable inside the `while` block.
